ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category. */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label representing the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL). */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Women, Men, Kids). */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record. */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size it corresponds to. */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement unit. */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., Bust, Waist, Hip). */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the measurement is applicable. */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Actual measurement value. */,
  "measurement_range" TEXT /* Range of measurements (e.g., 86.5-89). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement unit. */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement unit (e.g., cm, in). */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to convert to a standard unit. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country. */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country (e.g., US, UK, AU). */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Size standard used in the country. */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country. */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language(s) used in the country. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion record. */,
  "from_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original size being converted. */,
  "to_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size after conversion. */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the size standard applies. */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., US to UK, UK to US). */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for size conversion. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_to_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_from_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the historical record. */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size that changed. */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change in measurements. */,
  "old_measurements" TEXT /* Old measurements for the size. */,
  "new_measurements" TEXT /* New measurements for the size. */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in measurements. */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the change. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user. */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user. */,
  "preferred_size" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred size of the user. */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's country. */,
  "preferred_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's preferred measurement unit. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_size FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_preference_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the size information. */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being accessed. */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of access for logging the interaction. */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query used by the user. */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., View, Add to Cart, Purchase). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preference_logs_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preference_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
